home.title: THE ARCHIVE OF EXCELLENCE.
home.subtitle: Discover over 160 stores from the most prestigious international brands with discounts from 30% to 70% all year round.
home.newsletter.title: NEVER MISS AN EXCLUSIVE DROP.
home.newsletter.subtitle: Join our private list to receive early access to seasonal sales, limited events, and new store openings at FoxTown.
directory.title: Navigate Luxury.
directory.subtitle: Explore three floors of premium outlet shopping. Locate your favorite boutiques, find exclusive dining, and plan your journey through FoxTown.
login.hero: Access the world's most exclusive luxury outlets. Your curated shopping experience starts here.
login.signin_subtitle: Sign in to your member account.
rewards.step1_desc: Sign in to your FoxTown Rewards account to access your daily lucky spin and save your winnings instantly.
rewards.step2_desc: Every 24 hours you get a fresh chance. The wheel is reset with new designer perks and exclusive boutique vouchers.
rewards.step3_desc: Present your winning digital voucher at the participating boutique in FoxTown Mendrisio to claim your prize.
rewards.hero_subtitle: Experience the thrill of luxury rewards. Try every day to unlock exclusive discounts.
rewards.disclaimer_game: Disclaimer: this game is not finished yet.
rewards.prize_10: You won 10% off your next purchase.
rewards.prize_15: You won 15% off your next purchase.
rewards.prize_20: You won 20% off your next purchase.
rewards.prize_voucher: You won a CHF 25 shopping voucher.
rewards.prize_free_coffee: You won a free coffee at FoxCafe.
rewards.prize_try_again: No reward this time. Come back tomorrow.
rewards.participating_subtitle: Discover exclusive prizes redeemable at over 160 luxury stores across the outlet.
rewards_draw.status.max_three_categories: You can select at most 3 categories.
rewards_draw.status.no_store_for_selecti: No store is available for this selection.

rewards_draw.status.email_ready: Promo won: simulated email prepared for {email}.
rewards_draw.status.one_game_per_day_lim: You have already played today. Come back tomorrow.
rewards_draw.status.game_closed_daily_qu: Today's 10 prizes are gone. Come back after the reset.
rewards_draw.status.server_error: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
rewards_draw.game_closed.title: GAME PAUSED
rewards_draw.game_closed.body: The daily limit of 10 prizes has been reached. Play will resume after the countdown (UTC midnight).
rewards_draw.status.daily_prize_limit_re: Daily limit reached: 10 prizes have already been distributed today.
rewards_draw.status.daily_prize_limit_ju: Sorry, today's limit of 10 prizes has just been reached.
rewards_draw.email.subject: Your FoxTown promo QR code
rewards_draw.email.body: Hello {user}, your promo is ready: -{discount}% at {store}. Valid until {date}.
rewards_draw.daily_reset.heading: DAILY QUOTA (10 PRIZES)
rewards_draw.daily_reset.resets_at: Counters reset from {time} on this device (midnight UTC).
rewards_draw.daily_reset.utc_hint: The countdown follows the server day boundary (UTC), same as the 10-prize limit.
store.not_found_body: The requested store could not be loaded.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Need more information or want to file a complaint? Contact our Customer Service.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1.title: 1. Identity and Contact Information of the Data Controller
privacy.s1.body: The data controller is Tarchini FoxTown SA, a Swiss company headquartered at Centro Galleria 3, Via Cantonale 6928 Manno, Switzerland.
privacy.s2.title: 2. Categories of Personal Data Being Processed
privacy.s2.body: The company processes personal, sensitive, and third-party data as needed for services and legal obligations.
privacy.s3.title: 3. Data Protection — Recipients of Personal Data
privacy.s3.body: Data may be shared with IT providers, advisors, authorities, and group companies where required by law or operations.
privacy.s4.title: 4. Processing Purposes and Data Retention
privacy.s4.body: Data is processed for site operation, support, legal compliance, and marketing, and retained according to legal requirements.
privacy.s5.title: 5. Transfer of Personal Data Outside Switzerland
privacy.s5.body: International transfers are protected by appropriate safeguards and contractual clauses.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Rights of the Data Subject
privacy.s6.body: You may request access, correction, deletion, or restriction by contacting privacy@foxtown.ch.
privacy.s7.title: 7. Current Version and Updates
privacy.s7.body: This policy may be updated to remain compliant with applicable laws.
terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.s1.title: 1. Scope
terms.s1.body: These terms govern access to and use of the FoxTown website and related digital services.
terms.s2.title: 2. Accuracy of Information
terms.s2.body: Store details, opening hours, and promotions are provided for convenience and may change without prior notice.
terms.s3.title: 3. Acceptable Use
terms.s3.body: You agree not to misuse the site, interfere with services, or attempt unauthorized access to protected areas.
terms.s4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
terms.s4.body: All content, branding, and media on this site are owned by or licensed to FoxTown and may not be reused without permission.
terms.s5.title: 5. Liability and Governing Law
terms.s5.body: FoxTown is not liable for indirect damages resulting from website use. Swiss law applies to these terms.
